chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-178 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Main Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 11-03-2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for proposed accused No.2. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Mr. Sikandar Ali Siddiqui, Advocate is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Naeemuddin Z. Kasimi, counsel for the applicant and requests for adjournment on the ground that he is not feeling well. The case history shows that since filing of this application, most of the times, learned counsel for applicant has remained absent on one ground or the other. Learned counsel, who is holding brief on behalf of applicant’s counsel, has refused to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
